          if (!href) return;
          // skip external links and non-navigational ones
          if (
            href.startsWith('http') && !href.includes(window.location.host) ||
            href.startsWith('#') ||
            href.startsWith('mailto:') ||
            href.startsWith('tel:')
          ) return;

          let [base, q = ''] = href.split('?');
          let newQuery = q ? new URLSearchParams(q) : new URLSearchParams();

          // add or overwrite tracked params
          keep.forEach((val, key) => {
            newQuery.set(key, val);
          });

          a.setAttribute('href', base + '?' + newQuery.toString());
        });

        // populate params into hidden input fields
        // iterate form mappings
        for (const formId in formFieldMappings) {
          const formMap = formFieldMappings[formId];
          // find form container by id
          const formContainer = document.getElementById(formId);
          if (formContainer) {
            // iterate (keep)
            keep.forEach((value, trackingParam) => {
              // Check if this form is configured to track this parameter
              const formFieldName = formMap[trackingParam];
              if (formFieldName) {
                // Select the actual input field using the Gravity Forms name convention
                // use formContainer.querySelector to search ONLY within this form
                const inputField = formContainer.querySelector(`[name="${formFieldName}"]`);

                if (inputField) {
                  // Populate the field with the URL parameter value
                  inputField.value = value;
                } else {
                  // Optional: Log a warning if the expected field name isn't found

                }
              }
            });
          }
        }
